ew_context: Falling wedge suggesting wave 4 corrective structure completion. Bullish divergence setup pointing toward wave 5 extension or new impulse sequence
pattern_desc: Contracting falling wedge pattern with converging trendlines. Lower highs at 117.63, 110.93, 109.47 and higher lows creating bullish reversal setup
key_levels: Support: 88.66 (wedge lower boundary). Resistance: 117.63 (target and prior high), 110.93 (intermediate resistance)
invalidation: Close below 80.64 on D1 timeframe would break the wedge support and negate the bullish reversal pattern
market_context: Middle East tensions escalating with Iran attacks supporting oil prices. Geopolitical risk premium driving energy sector higher amid supply concerns
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

USOIL has formed a clear falling wedge pattern with contracting volatility and converging trendlines, typically a bullish reversal formation. The pattern shows declining highs from 117.63 to 110.93 to 109.47, while lows have been rising from 80.56 to 88.66 to 91.05. Current entry at 95.75 sits near wedge resistance, suggesting imminent breakout potential toward the measured target at 117.63.

RSI at 43.1% shows oversold momentum recovering from extreme levels, while EMA20 at 95.84 crossing above EMA50 at 94.27 confirms bullish trend resumption. The substantial daily ATR of 5.35 reflects elevated energy sector volatility supporting large directional moves.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 117.63 (pattern target and prior significant high), 110.93 (intermediate resistance level)
- **Support**: 88.66 (wedge support boundary), 80.64 (critical structural support)

## Invalidation Level

A close below 80.64 on D1 timeframe would violate the wedge formation and signal continuation of the broader downtrend rather than reversal.

## Macro & Flow Context

Escalating Middle East tensions with Iran drone attacks create significant supply risk premium. CFD physics showing moderate Reynolds number with aligned momentum supports the bullish breakout thesis.
